title: eriosema kankolo
intro: Eriosema kankolo, also known as Kankolo, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihelmintic activities. The health benefits associated with Eriosema kankolo include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and parasitic infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
